title: psychotria solfiana subsp. fleuryana
intro: Psychotria solfiana subsp. fleuryana is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as Fleury's wild coffee or Psychotria fleuryana. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing protection against oxidative stress. Fleuryana preparations can be made from the leaves and stems of the plant, typically dried or crushed and used in tea infusions, tinctures, or capsules, offering a potential natural remedy for various health concerns.
